sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106374" key="u(dreutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρ-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n106374.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for watering,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄργανα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Polyh.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:9:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
